race.description: Tursa Employment Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: SPARTAN STEEL (1) finished just shy of the frame in fourth last start after being in the firing line on the corner over 1400m at Taree, an improvement on his fifth on debut at Port Macquarie the run before. Drops back to the 1200m third-up and should be sharpened by the blinkers. Can break through now. MISS MIDAS TOUCH (8) returns. Showed positive signs in her debut prep and was well supported throughout. Hasn't been seen at any public trials but she gets in light with the 2kg claimer engaged and this does look a thin contest. Can make a bright return. BUCKET LIST (2) returns and came desperately close to getting off the mark before the break at Graton. In the mix. COSMIC FUN (7) comes into the mix after some key scratchings.
